summary: Logging and Auto-refresh Feature Testing Complete. All features working correctly: 1) Transaction logs now appear when filtered by module='transactions' (74+ log_activity calls added), 2) GET /api/logs returns logs from multiple modules, 3) GET /api/logs/stats returns comprehensive stats, 4) useAutoRefresh hook implemented in Dashboard, Transactions, AccountantDashboard, and VendorDashboard pages.

tests: GET /api/logs accessible - returns logs with pagination
GET /api/logs/stats returns total_logs, today_logs, by_type breakdown
POST /api/transactions creates transaction AND generates activity log in 'transactions' module
GET /api/logs?module=transactions returns transaction logs (2 records found after creating test transactions)
GET /api/logs?module=clients returns client logs
GET /api/logs (all) returns logs from multiple modules
GET /api/logs?log_type=auth returns auth logs
Create client generates log entry in 'clients' module
Update client generates log entry with 'edit' action
Create treasury generates log entry in 'treasury' module
Logs Management page loads with stats cards (Total: 644, Today: 577, Auth: 583, Activity: 61)
Module filter dropdown shows modules: Authentication, Transactions, Clients, Treasury, etc.
Filtering by 'Transactions' module shows transaction logs (2 records)
Tabs work: All Logs, Activity, Auth, Audit
Table displays: Timestamp, Type, Action, Module, User, Description, IP Address, Status
Export CSV button present
Clear old logs dropdown functional
useAutoRefresh hook implemented in /frontend/src/hooks/useAutoRefresh.js
Dashboard.js uses useAutoRefresh(fetchData, 30000) - 30s interval
Transactions.js uses useAutoRefresh(fetchTransactions, 30000) - 30s interval
AccountantDashboard.js uses useAutoRefresh - 15s interval for pending items
VendorDashboard.js uses useAutoRefresh - 15s interval
Hook refetches on visibility change (user returns to tab)
Hook polls periodically only when page is visible
Dashboard page loads successfully
Transactions page loads with transaction list
AccountantDashboard (Approvals) page loads with pending items tabs
Logs page shows activity logs with module filter
VendorDashboard loads with Exchanger Portal showing transactions, settlements, and stats

critical_code_review_comments: Good: 74+ log_activity calls added across all CRUD endpoints in server.py
Good: Transaction logs now being created when transactions are created/updated/approved/rejected
Good: useAutoRefresh hook properly implements visibility-based + interval-based refresh
Good: Dashboard polls every 30s, AccountantDashboard and VendorDashboard poll every 15s
Good: Logs page has comprehensive filtering (module, date range, search, log type tabs)
Good: Logs stats endpoint returns detailed breakdown by type and module
seed_data_creation: Created test transactions and clients for logging verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logging system now has 74+ log_activity calls across all modules. Key modules: transactions, clients, treasury, lp_management, psp, exchangers, income_expenses. Auto-refresh implemented using useAutoRefresh hook with visibility change and interval-based polling. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_logging_and_autorefresh.py
